source_commit_policy: base_merge_commit identifies the immutable code/content commit; current HEAD may be that commit or a descendant changing only release metadata files
truth_boundary: Git fields were derived from canonical Git objects. The provenance records the immutable code/content commit rather than pretending a self-referential metadata commit can name itself. Only descendants changing SOURCE_PROVENANCE.json and PACKAGE_INTEGRITY_MANIFEST.json remain valid.
